text: BREAKING: Massive explosions across Tehran, Isfahan, Qom, Karaj. Anti-aircraft fire visible from multiple angles. This is the largest coordinated strike package ever launched against Iran.
verificationNote: Confirmed by CENTCOM and multiple ground video sources

text: Iranian state media confirming death of Supreme Leader Khamenei. 40 days of mourning declared. IRGC vowing 'the heaviest response in the history of the Islamic Republic.'
verificationNote: Confirmed by Iranian state TV (IRIB) and multiple officials

text: Missile impact confirmed in Beit Shemesh, Israel. Rescue teams on scene. Reports of 9 dead. Part of Iran's Operation True Promise IV retaliatory barrage.
verificationNote: Confirmed by IDF, MDA, and ground footage

text: Strait of Hormuz effectively shut. AIS shows 150+ vessels at anchor. No transits in 18 hours. War-risk insurance pulled. Blocking ~15M bbl/day - 20% of global oil supply.
verificationNote: Verified through AIS data and maritime insurance reports

text: US submarine torpedoed Iranian warship IRINS Dena off Sri Lanka. 101 of 180 crew missing. First warship sunk by submarine since the Falklands War.
verificationNote: Confirmed by CENTCOM and Iranian Navy

text: UNVERIFIED: Reports of secondary explosions at Parchin military complex suggesting stored weapons hit. Satellite pass in 4 hours should confirm.
verificationNote: Multiple OSINT accounts reporting but awaiting satellite confirmation

text: Minab school strike death toll revised to ~180, mostly schoolgirls. Most controversial civilian casualty event of the conflict. International condemnation growing rapidly.
verificationNote: Initial toll confirmed; revised figure from Iranian medical sources, partially verified

text: AWS data centers in Bahrain and UAE remain offline after drone strikes. Cascading failures across Middle East cloud infrastructure. Major services disrupted region-wide.
verificationNote: Confirmed by AWS status page and enterprise reports

text: Reports from sources on the ground: heavy Iranian missile launches from underground facilities in Kerman province toward Israeli targets. Multiple waves detected. Damage reports incoming.
verificationNote: Monitored lead source - partially corroborated by satellite imagery

text: IRGC underground missile bases in western Iran reportedly surviving strikes and continuing to launch. Tunnel complexes far more extensive than US intelligence estimated. This war is far from over.
verificationNote: Monitored lead source - consistent with known IRGC underground facility networks

text: Iranian military claims successful strikes on Nevatim airbase in Israel causing significant damage to F-35 hangars. IDF has not confirmed or denied. Israeli censorship orders in effect for strike damage.
verificationNote: Monitored lead source - Iranian military claim, unverifiable due to Israeli censorship on strike damage reporting

text: Multiple reports of a second wave of Iranian ballistic missiles heading toward Gulf shipping lanes. CENTCOM has not yet commented. Tanker crews reporting to shelters. This could mean total Hormuz closure.
verificationNote: Monitored lead source - under active verification. Maritime tracking data inconclusive so far.

text: BREAKING: Multiple B-2 Spirit stealth bombers confirmed striking Isfahan and Natanz nuclear facilities with GBU-57 bunker busters. Seismic stations across the region detecting underground detonations. This is the deepest penetration strike of the war so far.
verificationNote: Confirmed by CENTCOM post-strike imagery and seismic monitoring data from CTBTO stations

text: Iran retaliates: Fateh-313 and Dezful missiles fired at US 5th Fleet HQ in Bahrain. Most intercepted by Patriot/THAAD but at least 2 impacts confirmed on base. Pentagon now confirming 12 US service members wounded, 3 critical. This is escalating rapidly.
verificationNote: CENTCOM confirms casualties; Bahraini civil defense corroborates missile alerts and interception sounds heard across Manama

text: Massive cyber attack has taken down Iran's entire SHETAB interbank network. ATMs offline nationwide. Electronic transactions frozen. Millions unable to access funds. Attribution pointing to Unit 8200. This is financial warfare at an unprecedented scale.
verificationNote: Banking outage confirmed by multiple Iranian sources and banking association; attribution to Unit 8200 based on technical signatures but not officially confirmed

text: UN Security Council emergency session just ended. Russia-China ceasefire resolution VETOED by US and UK. France abstained. Secretary-General visibly frustrated. Meanwhile massive anti-war protests forming across US cities. Tens of thousands in DC alone.
verificationNote: UN voting record confirms veto; protest coverage from AP, CNN, and NPR with live footage from Washington, New York, and Los Angeles

text: MASSIVE fires at Tehran oil storage facility. Israeli jets targeted energy infrastructure for the first time — marking a significant escalation. Fires visible from 30km away. This is NOT going to help oil prices.
verificationNote: Confirmed by CBS News, AP satellite imagery, and Iranian state media IRNA

text: Trump at Dover AFB for dignified transfer of fallen servicemembers. 6 US troops KIA so far. Meanwhile NBC reports he's privately pushing for ground invasion. This war is about to enter a new phase.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Bloomberg, NBC News, and White House pool reports

text: UPDATE: IRGC drones hit tankers Prima and Louise P in the Gulf. Tugboat assisting Safeen Prestige struck by 2 missiles — all 8 crew feared dead. 8+ vessels now damaged. Dry bulk transits through Hormuz down 91%. This is an active war zone for shipping.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Kpler maritime data, Lloyd's List, and multiple ship tracking services

text: Iranian missiles detected heading towards Tel Aviv. Series of explosions confirmed across the city. Iron Dome and Arrow systems engaging. Day 9 and Iran's missile inventory still holding — estimates suggest 2,500 long-range missiles pre-war.
verificationNote: Confirmed by IDF spokesperson, Israeli Home Front Command, and multiple ground video sources

text: Ali Larijani claims Iran captured US soldiers. Trump admin denies. Meanwhile CIA reportedly smuggling weapons to Kurdish forces in western Iran. Information war intensifying as both sides claim successes they can't independently verify.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera reports claims. US denial confirmed by State Dept. Kurdish arming reported by multiple outlets but unconfirmed officially.

text: Iran claims to have fired 500+ ballistic/naval missiles and 2,000 drones since Feb 28. Even if inflated, the scale of retaliation has exceeded all Western predictions. Defense stockpiles being tested.
verificationNote: Missile counts partially corroborated by CENTCOM intercept reports and satellite imagery of launch sites

text: CONFIRMED: Hezbollah drone struck RAF Akrotiri in Cyprus. First attack on European NATO territory. This just became a global crisis, not a regional war.
verificationNote: Confirmed by UK Ministry of Defence and NATO spokesperson

text: Saudi Arabia reports first civilian deaths — 2 killed in Al-Kharj when Iranian projectile hit residential area near Riyadh. 12 more wounded. This war is spreading to every corner of the Gulf.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Saudi Press Agency and Al Arabiya with hospital footage

text: US has now lost 8 service members killed in this war. Trump attended dignified transfer at Dover AFB for 6 of them. Political pressure building — 85% of Americans oppose this war per YouGov.
verificationNote: CENTCOM casualty figures confirmed. YouGov poll published March 6. Dover AFB ceremony covered by AP pool

text: BREAKING: Assembly of Experts has elected Mojtaba Khamenei as new Supreme Leader. IRGC immediately pledged allegiance. This was expected but the speed is remarkable — succession completed in just 8 days.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Iranian state TV (IRIB), Assembly of Experts official announcement, and multiple diplomatic sources

text: Iran's FM Araghchi just rejected any ceasefire talks. 'We are not asking for a ceasefire.' Iran naming Mojtaba as new leader signals this will be a long war, not a quick collapse.
verificationNote: Araghchi statement broadcast on IRNA and confirmed by multiple diplomatic correspondents

text: Swiss government officially declares US-Israel strikes violate international law. First major Western ally to break ranks. The diplomatic isolation of the US is growing.
verificationNote: Swiss Federal Council statement published on admin.ch. Confirmed by Reuters and AFP

text: Brent crude just hit $119.50/barrel intraday. The Strait of Hormuz is effectively closed. This is the largest oil supply disruption in modern history. No precedent for this.
verificationNote: ICE Brent futures data confirmed. EIA and IEA both characterize Hormuz as effectively closed

text: BREAKING: AFP confirms AI-generated fake satellite imagery showing 'destroyed US base in Qatar' was created with Google AI tools (SynthID watermark detected). Iranian outlet spread it. Got millions of views before debunked. AI disinformation in warfare is here.
verificationNote: AFP fact-check confirmed. Google SynthID detected. Gibberish coordinates in image confirmed fabrication

text: IDF says Lebanon (Hezbollah) has conducted MORE attacks against Israel than Iran itself over the past week. This is now a full multi-front war. Hezbollah missiles struck central Israel today. 70+ weapons depots hit by IDF in response.
verificationNote: IDF operational data confirms attack comparison. Multiple Israeli media outlets corroborate

text: Senate war powers vote just failed. Trump has unlimited authorization to continue Iran operations. Hegseth signaling a 4-8 week campaign. No Congressional check. This war has no defined end date.
verificationNote: Senate vote publicly recorded. Hegseth statements from Pentagon briefing confirmed by Washington Times

text: NATO has now intercepted TWO Iranian ballistic missiles over Turkish airspace. Turkey deploying 6 F-16s and additional air defense to Northern Cyprus. If a third incident occurs, Article 5 discussions will be impossible to avoid.
verificationNote: NATO confirmed interception. Turkish military deployment reported by Anadolu Agency and Reuters

text: DEBUNKED: Viral claim that Netanyahu's brother was killed in an Iranian retaliatory strike is FALSE. The claim originated from an unverified Iranian Telegram channel and was amplified by bot networks. Netanyahu's family confirmed safe. Another example of wartime disinformation.
verificationNote: Netanyahu family status confirmed by Israeli PM office; Telegram origin traced by OSINT analysts; multiple fact-checkers debunked

text: AIS data for March 8: Only 2 outbound transits through Strait of Hormuz. Pre-war average was 40-50 per day. This is a 96% drop. We are witnessing the most severe disruption to global oil shipping since World War II. Insurance rates now at war-risk levels for entire Persian Gulf.
verificationNote: AIS tracking data from MarineTraffic and Kpler confirms transit numbers; Lloyd's List war-risk insurance confirmation

text: Multiple European intelligence sources tell me Russia has been sharing satellite imagery and electronic intelligence with Iran throughout the conflict. Specifically targeting US carrier group positions and Israeli air operations. If confirmed, this is a major escalation of Russian involvement.
verificationNote: Grozev is a verified investigative journalist with deep intelligence community sources; claim partially corroborated by Estonian defense ministry statement

text: BREAKING: Hegseth says tomorrow will be the 'most intense day of strikes' yet. Over 3,000 targets hit so far. CENTCOM now openly talking about a 4-8 week campaign. This is not ending anytime soon despite Trump calling it a 'little excursion.'
verificationNote: Pentagon briefing confirmed by PBS and Al Jazeera; CENTCOM 3,000+ targets figure corroborated by multiple outlets

text: Isfahan: OSINT satellite imagery confirms damage to UNESCO World Heritage sites — Naqsh-e Jahan Square, Shah Mosque, Ali Qapu, Chehel Sotoun. These are irreplaceable 400+ year old monuments. Cultural destruction on a scale not seen since ISIS in Palmyra.
verificationNote: Satellite imagery analysis corroborated by multiple OSINT analysts; Al Jazeera and Britannica independently reported the damage

text: 40 killed in eastern Tehran residential building strike. Separately, toxic smoke from oil facility strikes blanketing the capital. Iran internet still at ~4% — we're getting very limited imagery from inside Iran. The full scale of destruction remains unknown.
verificationNote: Tehran residential strike death toll confirmed by Al Jazeera and Iranian state media; internet connectivity data from Cloudflare Radar and OONI

text: Fertilizer crisis incoming: 33% of globally traded fertilizer transits the Strait of Hormuz. Urea jumped from $450 to $600/tonne in one week. This hits at the worst possible time — start of Northern Hemisphere planting season. Food prices will follow oil prices up.
verificationNote: Bloomberg and UN report confirm fertilizer supply disruption; CBC and IFPRI corroborate urea price spike

text: BREAKING: Oil crashes 11-12% after Trump says war will end 'very soon.' Brent to $87.80, WTI to $83.45. Biggest single-day oil drop since conflict began. Markets pricing in de-escalation. But Hormuz is STILL closed and Netanyahu vows 'many surprises.' Watch the gap.
verificationNote: Oil price movements confirmed by CNN Business, CNBC, Bloomberg. Trump quotes confirmed by NPR and Al Jazeera

text: CENTCOM confirms 5,000+ targets struck since Feb 28. 90% reduction in Iranian missile launches, 83% decrease in drone attacks. 16 minelayers destroyed near Hormuz. Second IRGC warship sunk at Bandar Abbas. Iran's military capability being systematically degraded.
verificationNote: CENTCOM/Pentagon press briefing figures confirmed by CBS News and Alma Research Center daily report

text: FACT CHECK: AI-generated satellite imagery proliferating in Iran war. Tehran Times posted manipulated 'before/after' image of US base in Qatar (was actually Bahrain, from prior year). AFP detected SynthID watermark from Google AI tools. Be extremely cautious with viral imagery.
verificationNote: AFP and France24 independently verified the fake imagery. SynthID watermark detection confirmed by Google

text: IDF confirms: ~300 Iranian missiles fired at Israel, roughly HALF carried cluster bomb warheads banned under 2008 Convention. 6 impact sites in central Israel from latest salvo. This is a major escalation in weaponry — cluster munitions are designed to maximize civilian casualties.
verificationNote: IDF cluster munition assessment confirmed by Times of Israel and NBC News

text: BREAKING: IEA approves record 400M barrel oil reserve release — largest coordinated drawdown EVER. But let's put it in context: max release rate is ~6 Mbpd. Hormuz blockade has removed ~15 Mbpd. The math doesn't add up. This buys time, not a solution.
verificationNote: IEA official announcement confirmed by Reuters and Bloomberg; release rate calculations consistent with IEA data

text: Iran deploys Khoramshahr super-heavy missiles for first time in conflict. These are Iran's biggest — 2,000+ km range, 1,800 kg warhead. If Iran is going to its heaviest conventional weapons, they're either desperate or escalating. Either way, the '37th wave' is no joke.
verificationNote: Khoramshahr missile specs consistent with missile databases; launch confirmed by IDF and Al Jazeera

text: 3 more ships attacked near Hormuz today. That's 14 total since the war started. Shipping traffic down 95%. This is the worst disruption to global shipping since WWII. Even the Suez Crisis and Tanker War didn't halt traffic this completely. 320+ vessels just sitting at anchor.
verificationNote: Lloyd's List and maritime AIS data confirm 14 total ships damaged/sunk; 95% traffic reduction corroborated by MarineTraffic

text: Hengaw reports 4,300+ killed in Iran — triple the govt's 1,380 figure. With internet at 4% of normal, independent verification is nearly impossible. This mirrors every past conflict where Iranian govt severely undercounts casualties. The true toll may be far higher.
verificationNote: Hengaw has a track record of reliable casualty reporting on Iran; BBC Persian reported the discrepancy; internet data from Cloudflare Radar

text: Iran-Hezbollah 'integrated operation' represents a fundamental shift. First time Iran has coordinated a simultaneous multi-front attack with Hezbollah in real time. 200+ rockets/20 drones from Lebanon + ballistic missiles from Iran = Israeli air defense under unprecedented strain.
verificationNote: IntelCrab is a reliable OSINT source; attack details confirmed by IDF and multiple outlets

text: Russia is now providing specific tactical drone guidance to Iran per multiple reports. This is no longer just 'general military support' — this is active operational coordination. The proxy war dimension just escalated significantly.
verificationNote: Multiple intelligence sources cited; specific details of Russian tactical support not independently verified

text: CENTCOM confirms approximately 6,000 targets struck across Iran since Feb 28. Over 90 Iranian vessels including 30+ mine-laying ships destroyed. Satellite imagery shows heavy damage at Bandar Abbas Military Port, Parchin Complex, and Konarak naval base with burning ships visible.
verificationNote: CENTCOM figures confirmed; satellite imagery from Planet Labs and open sources corroborates naval base damage

text: Key divergence emerging: Trump says war ending 'soon,' Israel says 'no time limit,' Iran's Araghchi says 'not asking for ceasefire,' and Mojtaba's first statement calls for opening 'new fronts.' All four parties are saying different things. Nobody is moving toward de-escalation.
verificationNote: Analysis based on confirmed public statements from all parties

text: AI disinformation is becoming a major problem in this war. Tehran Times posted a manipulated Google Earth image claiming to show a destroyed US radar in Qatar — it was actually from Bahrain. Planet Labs and Vantor have now restricted satellite image access to the Middle East.
verificationNote: AI disinformation confirmed by France24 investigation; satellite restrictions confirmed by Washington Post
